svg.title: Receipt Detector — Full AWS Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing the full system from user browser through CloudFront, S3, Cognito, Lambda, API Gateway, ALB, and ECS Fargate running YOLO.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user do in the receipt detection flow?')
sendPrompt('What is CloudFront used for in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What files are stored in the S3 frontend bucket?')
sendPrompt('What is Cognito hosted UI used for?')
sendPrompt('What does the Lambda token exchange function do?')
sendPrompt('What does API Gateway do in this setup?')
sendPrompt('What does the Application Load Balancer do?')
sendPrompt('What runs inside the ECS Fargate task?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in ECR and how does ECS use it?')
